commands.name: repo-harness-plan
commands.summary: Interactive planning entrypoint for repo-local agentic development work.

commands.name: repo-harness-review
commands.engine: inspect-project-state plus plan and review artifacts
commands.summary: Reviews an existing plan across product, engineering, design, and DevEx dimensions.

commands.name: repo-harness-autoplan
commands.engine: plan, two self-review passes, execution, check, then repo-harness-ship
commands.summary: Runs the full repo-harness workflow automatically and delegates final PR closeout to repo-harness-ship.

commands.name: repo-harness-ship
commands.summary: Validates finished worktrees, commits through finish --no-merge, pushes branches, and creates GitHub PRs by default.

commands.name: repo-harness-init
commands.summary: Installs or refreshes the agentic workflow in an existing repository without creating an app stack.

commands.name: repo-harness-scaffold
commands.summary: Branch command that creates a new project or module scaffold from plan catalog A-K and attaches the harness.

commands.name: repo-harness-migrate
commands.summary: Migrates legacy Claude/Codex workflow surfaces while preserving or archiving user-authored content.

commands.name: repo-harness-upgrade
commands.summary: Refreshes an already-installed harness using manifest-owned upgrade actions.

commands.name: repo-harness-capability
commands.summary: Adds selected capability boundaries without running full init, migrate, or upgrade.

commands.name: repo-harness-architecture
commands.engine: architecture index, drift requests, capability resolver, archive helper, mermaid
commands.summary: Resolves architecture drift requests and updates architecture docs or diagrams without refreshing the harness.

commands.name: repo-harness-handoff
commands.summary: Prepares or resumes Codex handoff packets for long-task rollover.

commands.name: repo-harness-deploy
commands.summary: Checks deploy and private operations configuration without publishing or deploying.

commands.name: repo-harness-repair
commands.summary: Repairs broken task sync, hook routing, handoff, context-map, policy, or helper drift.

commands.name: repo-harness-check
commands.engine: workflow gates, task sync, inspector, migration dry-run
commands.summary: Runs the repo-local harness verification gate and reports pre-merge or release readiness.

commands.name: repo-harness-prd
commands.engine: prd template plus evidence rules and task-workflow checks
commands.summary: Generates an AI-implementation-friendly PRD from a product idea into plans/prds/.

commands.name: repo-harness-sprint
commands.engine: sprint-backlog helper plus $think expansion, capture-plan, and contract worktree flow
commands.summary: Plans a long-task sprint backlog from an upper-layer PRD and expands each row with $think before the task-contract flow.
